_meta.author: sshahaider
_meta.title: Play Store Button
_meta.description: A sleek, customizable CTA (Call to Action) that mimics the official Google Play style. With a built-in Google Play icon, bold typography, it’s perfect for apps, SaaS platforms, or landing pages that need to drive users to the Play Store. Designed with flexibility in mind, you can easily extend it with custom variants, sizes, or interactions while keeping a professional look.
